title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: India has 100M weekly active ChatGPT users, Sam Altman says
items.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says India has the largest number of student users of ChatGPT worldwide.

items.title: Anthropic and the Pentagon are reportedly arguing over Claude usage
items.description: The apparent issue: whether Claude can be used for mass domestic surveillance and autonomous weapons.

items.title: The Nothing That Has the Potential to Be Anything
items.description: You can never truly empty a box. Why? Zero-point energy.

items.title: Longtime NPR host David Greene sues Google over NotebookLM voice
items.description: The longtime host of NPR’s “Morning Edition,” is suing Google, alleging that the male podcast voice in the company’s NotebookLM tool is based on him.

items.title: The Best Samsung Phones of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
items.description: From flagship and budget to flipping and folding, Samsung’s Galaxy range spans the breadth of the smartphone cosmos. WIRED’s here to help you make you...

items.title: OpenClaw creator Peter Steinberger joins OpenAI
items.description: OpenAI said OpenClaw will live on as an open source project.

items.title: Google’s AI Overviews Can Scam You. Here’s How to Stay Safe
items.description: Beyond mistakes or nonsense, deliberately bad information being injected into AI search summaries is leading people down potentially harmful paths.

items.title: 9 Best Windows Laptops (2026): WIRED-Tested Laptops to Buy
items.description: Windows laptops have never been so good, and they're only going to get better as we move through 2026.

items.title: CurrentBody LED Hair Growth Helmet Review: Baby Hairs Abound (2026)
items.description: This FDA-cleared red-light helmet helps spur hair growth and is Bluetooth-enabled with a comfortable design. But don’t expect results overnight.

items.title: The enterprise AI land grab is on. Glean is building the layer beneath the interface.
